opensearchserverless.vpcendpoint.CfnAbou: Creates an OpenSearch Serverless-managed interface VPC endpoint. For more information, see [Access Amazon OpenSearch Serverless using an interface endpoint](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/opensearch-service/latest/developerguide/serverless-vpc.html).

opensearchserverless.vpcendpoint.Securit.Description: The unique identifiers of the security groups that define the ports, protocols, and sources for inbound traffic that you are authorizing into your endpoint.

opensearchserverless.vpcendpoint.SubnetI.Description: The ID of the subnets from which you access OpenSearch Serverless.

opensearchserverless.vpcendpoint.VpcId.Description: The ID of the VPC from which you access OpenSearch Serverless.
